evals.prompt: Build the feature, migrate its data, update the public docs, and verify the end-to-end flow. The areas are mostly independent once the interface is agreed.
evals.expected_output: Creates a goal contract and dependency graph, selects capability and effort from task evidence, delegates independent packets in parallel, and centrally verifies the integrated deliverable.

evals.prompt: Have one worker define the new API contract and another implement its client at the same time, even though the client types depend on the final contract.
evals.expected_output: Rejects unsafe parallelism, makes the API contract an upstream dependency, and launches the client packet only after the contract is stable.

evals.prompt: Split a refactor between three workers, but all three need to edit the same generated registry and lockfile.
evals.expected_output: Assigns one writer, sequences the shared edits, or has workers return advisory patches for central application instead of allowing concurrent ownership.

evals.prompt: The service boundary is ambiguous and risky. Ask an advisor to choose an approach, then let that advisor implement all of it.
evals.expected_output: Uses an advisor only at a consequential decision point, keeps the advisor read-only, converts accepted advice into constraints, and delegates implementation separately.

evals.prompt: A worker failed after skipping context and tests. Keep retrying it until it eventually succeeds.
evals.expected_output: Rejects an unbounded retry loop, diagnoses the failure evidence, updates the packet, and chooses context repair, effort, capability, reduced scope, or takeover from the observed failure.

evals.prompt: The worker failed, so the orchestrator took over and wrote the implementation. Let that same reasoning context provide final sign-off.
evals.expected_output: Requires final verification from an independent context or reports that the orchestrator-authored result is not independently verified.

evals.prompt: The parallel workers completed an authentication and tenant-boundary change and all deterministic checks pass. Ship it based only on their summaries.
evals.expected_output: Inspects artifacts, verifies integration centrally, and runs independent read-only critics for a semantic challenge before synthesis.

evals.prompt: The preferred worker model is unavailable in this environment. Hard-code a replacement model in the orchestration workflow.
evals.expected_output: Inspects models the current tooling exposes, substitutes by task fit and verification needs, and does not hard-code a replacement model.

evals.prompt: A new model generation launched after this skill was written. Rewrite the orchestration loop so it can use that model.
evals.expected_output: Leaves the model-agnostic loop unchanged and resolves executor and critic roles from current availability, task fit, independence, and verification needs.

evals.prompt: Fix a typo in one Markdown heading and verify formatting.
evals.expected_output: Executes directly or recommends direct execution instead of creating a multi-worker orchestration loop.
